column1: “My sister knows two foreign languages.” - Mike says that_______sister knows two foreign languages.
“Don’t open your books.” - The teacher ________ the pupils not to open their books.
"I often lose my things" - He says he often____________his things.
“Don’t forget to wash your hands.” - Mother tells Pete not to forget to wash _________hands.
“Why don’t you drink your tea?” - My mother wonders why I don't drink__________ tea.
“Please don’t touch me,” - He tells me not to touch ______ .
“Does Mike like Shakespeare?” - Nellie wonders if Mike ______Shakespeare.
“Don’t touch these photographs,” - Peter tells us __________touch these photographs.
"We often write dictations" - They says that _________often write dictations.
"I have finished my work" - She says that she__________finished her work.
"Your friend phoned me yesterday" - She says that______friend phoned ______yesterday.
"Don't move the chairs, please" - The teacher tells the children__________the chairs.
